scripts.postinstall: node -e "const v = require('@biomejs/biome/package.json').version; const fs = require('fs'); const c = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('biome.json')); c['$schema'] = 'https://biomejs.dev/schemas/' + v + '/schema.json'; fs.writeFileSync('biome.json', JSON.stringify(c, null, 2))"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w server"
